# aikido_cloud_azure (Resource)

Connects an Azure cloud environment to Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_cloud_azure" "production" {
  name            = "Azure Production"
  environment     = "production"
  application_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  directory_id    = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  subscription_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  key_value       = var.azure_client_secret
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) The Application ID of the registered application for Aikido scanning.
- `directory_id` (String) The Directory ID of the registered application.
- `environment` (String) The environment classification: `production`, `staging`, `development`, or `mixed`.
- `key_value` (String, Sensitive) The generated secret for the registered application.
- `name` (String) A name for this cloud environment.
- `subscription_id` (String) The relevant Azure Subscription ID.

### Read-Only

- `external_id` (String) The external identifier from Azure.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud environment.
